name: ThingsBoard
description: Open-source IoT platform for device management, telemetry, dashboards, and rule engines with cloud and on-prem options.

seo.title: ThingsBoard — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: ThingsBoard: Open-source IoT platform for device management, telemetry, dashboards, and rule engines with cloud and on-prem options.

when_to_use: Open-source IoT platform with device management and dashboards
MQTT and CoAP device data ingestion with rule engine
Real-time telemetry visualization for IoT deployments
Self-hosted IoT backend for smart city and industrial use cases
Edge computing with ThingsBoard Edge for local processing

pros: Supports MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, LwM2M out of box
cons: UI feels dated compared to modern IoT SaaS
Steep learning curve for rule chains
review.verdict: Solid open-source IoT platform with real scale, but you inherit the ops burden unless you pay for PE.
review.best_for: Teams that need self-hosted IoT with device mgmt, telemetry and rule chains
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a polished managed IoT SaaS with zero ops
